query: I have a Dockerfile that's 800MB and takes 10 minutes to build. It uses ubuntu:latest as the base image and installs a bunch of packages. Can you help optimize it?
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes this as an IaC optimization task and activates infrastructure-coder
Agent runs dockerfile-analyzer.py on the Dockerfile
Agent identifies issues: latest tag, large base image, likely missing multi-stage build
Agent loads references/dockerfile-guide.md for optimization patterns
Agent recommends: specific base image tag, multi-stage build, Alpine/slim base, layer ordering
Agent generates optimized Dockerfile with security hardening (non-root user, etc.)
